scenarios.name: Buyer Looking for Home
caller_inputs: Hi, I'm looking to buy a 3-bedroom house
I'd like to see some properties this weekend

scenarios.name: Seller Interested in Listing
caller_inputs: I'm thinking about selling my home
I'd like to know what my property is worth

scenarios.name: First-Time Buyer
caller_inputs: I'm a first-time buyer and I don't know where to start
Can you help me understand the process?
scenarios.expected_outcome: Agent provides guidance, buyer consultation scheduled

scenarios.name: Listing Inquiry
caller_inputs: I saw a listing online, can I see it?
scenarios.expected_outcome: Showing scheduled for the specific property
